inputs.prompt: [Image1] is a STORYBOARD of a single continuous scene shown as coverage panels — use it as an ingredient reference only for world, character, palette, beats, and the eyeline relationship. Do NOT reproduce the storyboard: no grid, borders, gutters, or labels. Synthesize ONE single continuous cinematic shot. A painterly concept-art forge: cavernous workshop, cool electric blue and violet shadow, warm gold automata, orange spark-light, volumetric haze. The seams are visible; nothing is smooth or over-rendered. One unbroken take. Open wide on the long line of gold automata receding into the blue dark. A slow, patient dolly-in along the line arrives on Hephaestus — bearded, fair-haired, weary — as he lifts a finished automaton and cradles its gold face in his hands. He studies it, turned screen-right; the automaton's serene blank eyes slowly open toward him and hold his gaze. The camera eases back to reveal the long receding army of identical others behind them. Patient, tender, uncanny. Low forge hum, the tick of cooling metal, a distant welder's hiss.
